zh.Gawsworth, Macclesfield, Cheshire, Engla: 英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯
英國英格蘭爾加福斯沃斯
zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Orreby於大約1280年出生在英國爾加福斯沃斯時，她的父親Thomas de Orreby49歲，母親Cicely de Massey15歲。她於大約1295年與Thomas Fitton I結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1346年在她的家鄉享年68歲。

zh-hans.Gawsworth, Macclesfield, Cheshire, Engla: 英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯
英国英格兰爾加福斯沃斯
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Orreby于大约1280年出生在英国爾加福斯沃斯时，她的父亲Thomas de Orreby49岁，母亲Cicely de Massey15岁。她于大约1295年与Thomas Fitton I结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1346年在她的家乡享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: Orreby
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Orry
meanings: English: variant of   Orrey  ;  see  Urry  .

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobelle

The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Orreby was born about 1280, in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, her father, Thomas de Orreby, was 49 and her mother, Cicely de Massey, was 15. She married Thomas Fitton I about 1295. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 3 daughters. She died about 1346, in her hometown, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Orreby est née environ 1280, à Gawsworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Thomas de Orreby, avait 49 ans et sa mère, Cicely de Massey, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Fitton I environ 1295. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1346, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isabel Orreby um 1280 in Gawsworth, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas de Orreby 49 und ihre Mutter Cicely de Massey 15. Sie hat um 1295 Thomas Fitton I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb um 1346 im Alter von 68 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Orreby è nata il circa 1280 nel Gawsworth, Cheshire, England, sua padre, Thomas de Orreby, aveva 49 anni e sua madre, Cicely de Massey, aveva 15 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Fitton I circa 1295. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 3 figlie. Morì circa 1346, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Orrebyが約1280年にイギリスチェシュアイアガウスウオルスで生まれた時，父Thomas de Orrebyは49歳，母Cicely de Masseyは15歳であった。約1295年にThomas Fitton Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1346年に故郷で68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Orreby(이)가 대략 1280년 영국 체실르 가w스워스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas de Orreby(은)는 49세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Cicely de Massey(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1295년 Thomas Fitton I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1346년 그녀의 고향에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Orreby nasceu aproximadamente 1280, em Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Thomas de Orreby, tinha 49 anos e sua mãe, Cicely de Massey, tinha 15 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Fitton I aproximadamente 1295. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1346, em sua cidade natal, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Orreby родилась около 1280 г. в местности гавсворт, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Thomas de Orreby было 49 лет, а матери, которую звали Cicely de Massey, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Fitton I около 1295 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла около 1346 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 68 лет.

sm.about 1280–about 1346: e tusa o le 1280–e tusa o le 1346

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isabel Orreby nació aproximadamente 1280, en Gawsworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Thomas de Orreby, tenía 49 años y su mamá, Cicely de Massey, tenía 15 años. Se casó con Thomas Fitton I aproximadamente 1295. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1346, en su pueblo, a la edad de 68 años.
